purpose: Defines an enum representing different difficulty levels for a game, specifying the number of enemies and smart enemies per level.

parameters.name: noOfEnemies
parameters.description: The number of enemies for the difficulty level.

parameters.name: noOfSmartEnemies
parameters.description: The number of smart enemies for the difficulty level.

return_value.description: No return value; initializes the enum constants with the provided values.
